description: Sandbox Bronze labels recomputed from merged raw telemetry.
sql: SELECT name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS datetime_fmt, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS substage, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS prop_conc_blend_denso, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS model_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_type, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS updated_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
